title: Dependency on removed core module MenuManager
description: Code references MenuManager which was removed from the CMSMS core in version 2.2.22. Use Navigator instead.
explanation: MenuManager was removed from the CMSMS core package in version 2.2.22. It was replaced by Navigator. Templates using {MenuManager} will break on fresh installs.
fix: Replace {MenuManager} with {Navigator} in templates. Update GetDependencies() to reference Navigator instead.
